description: Bri and Jacob discuss the latest updates in the Solana ecosystem, including the deprecation of legacy vote instructions, banking stage forwarding filters, and stake-weighted QoS adjustments. They highlight improvements in transaction simulation and resource optimization for developers.
topic_summary: Updates on Solana's Changelog for April 16, covering vote instruction changes [t=11:04], banking stage forwarding [t=40:26], and QoS adjustments [t=86:62].
